description_long: This cabinetry ensemble features a modern L-shaped configuration with a combination of tall pantry units, base cabinets, and wall-mounted cabinets. The exterior is predominantly white with accents of light wood, including open shelving and slatted wood paneling on the side. The central section is designed to accommodate a window or pass-through, with a countertop running beneath it and extending along both arms of the L-shape. The cabinetry includes a mix of closed storage with flat, handle-less doors and open cubby spaces for display or easy access. The countertop appears to be a light, solid surface material, providing ample workspace. The overall design is sleek and minimalist, suitable for contemporary urban interiors such as kitchens, break rooms, or communal spaces.
description: A modern L-shaped cabinetry set with white and light wood finishes, featuring tall pantry units, base cabinets, wall-mounted storage, and open shelving. The design is sleek and minimalist, with a central window cutout and ample countertop workspace.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full L-shaped layout, central window cutout, and a mix of closed and open storage.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the tall pantry units, slatted wood paneling, and open shelving details.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain back panel with the window cutout and minimal visible features.
description_view_3: End view showing the solid side of the cabinetry and the depth of the tall units.
attribute_cabinet_type: L-shaped kitchen suite with tall pantry, base cabinets, and wall cabinets
attribute_door_configuration: combination of flat panel doors, open shelves, and cubbies
